what_it_does: Implements pure, framework-agnostic DOM renderers for a gallery surface: DNA.renderUnit builds an immersive phone-screen card from a normalized unit; DNA.renderPiece builds a piece-in-focus archetype; DNA.renderDecisionGallery resolves and renders decision-card slides; plus a corner-V verb wheel, icon language, deterministic voice transform, and adapters that normalize corpus records and authored story nodes into the shared unit shape.
observations: Self-contained IIFE that attaches all exports to a global DNA namespace.
renderUnit constructs a phone-like screen using phone.css classes, with a status bar, brand title, optional hub-network field, frosted word card, stat chips, and a corner V control.
Includes a tap-to-open V wheel (DNA.bindVee) with five verb sockets that dispatch CustomEvent('vee:socket') and flash a transient confirmation.
Defines inline SVG assets: the VI logo (DNA.VI_SVG) and a small set of currentColor line icons (DNA.ICONS / DNA.icon).
Provides source adapters DNA.unitFromCorpus and DNA.unitFromStory that map heterogeneous records into the normalized unit shape.
DNA.renderGallery fetches /api/cognition/corpus and optional neighbours, renders the unit, binds the V, and emits gallery:rendered.
DNA.renderDecisionGallery fetches /api/territory and renders through DNA.renderArchetype, with optional DNA.decisionDevice visual device and DNA.renderExplained/DNA.decisionSlide composition.
DNA.voiceFromDigest deterministically derives a clean title and short card lines from a raw digest, avoiding filename dumps.
Uses data-anchorable attributes to mark directable targets throughout the card.
Registers a global window listener for gallery:write-error that calls _showWriteError on matching decision cards.
standouts: The corner-V verb wheel with fixed 90-degree arc geometry and CSS-driven open/close transition.
Deterministic voice transform from raw digests to human-readable titles and short card lines.
The explicit 'one renderer, many sources' adapter pattern for corpus and story records.
Progressive enhancement: pure render first, then optional bindVee for live interaction.
conventions: Attaches functionality to a global DNA namespace object.
Builds DOM via template strings assigned to innerHTML.
Escapes interpolated values through DNA.esc or a local esc helper.
Prefixes unit-view CSS classes with uv-.
Async integration functions degrade cleanly on fetch failure rather than throwing.
Dense narrative comments reference external contracts, gates, and commit hashes.
concerns: innerHTML construction with string concatenation is XSS-sensitive if esc is ever bypassed or omitted.
Relies on several global DNA.* helpers (DNA.org.hubNetwork, DNA.renderArchetype, DNA.decisionDevice, DNA.renderExplained, DNA.decisionSlide) without local implementations.
The global gallery:write-error listener assumes card._showWriteError exists but does not verify it is a function.
V-corner geometry uses hard-coded pixel coordinates (PVx, PVy, R) that may not adapt to all viewports.
renderDecisionGallery mutates container.style.containerType as a side effect.
notes: A pure presentation layer that normalizes heterogeneous sources into a shared phone-screen gallery look, with a distinctive corner-V verb wheel and deterministic text shaping.
questions: What exact value and markup does DNA.org.hubNetwork return for the uv-field?
How does DNA.renderArchetype consume the decision-card archetype and the resolve function?
Which host bundles provide DNA.decisionDevice, DNA.renderExplained, and DNA.decisionSlide?
Is the V-corner geometry responsive, or fixed to a specific phone viewport size?
What should happen when the address starts with decision:// but DNA.renderArchetype is not loaded?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is a pure, framework-agnostic presentation renderer for normalized units; the file matches that while also adding fetch-based integration, source adapters, and interaction binding, so it stretches slightly beyond 'pure' into live-compose integration.
apparent_themes: Deterministic, safe text shaping over raw data dumps
intention_signals: The file is trying to make heterogeneous backend records and authored content presentable through a single polished, mobile-like gallery surface, keeping the renderer pure and wiring interactions progressively through events and data-bound sockets.
novelty: The corner-V verb wheel with a 90-degree arc socket expansion and the deterministic voice transform from raw digests are distinctive, as is the explicit adapter pattern that unifies corpus and story sources under one renderer.
contribution: Provides a reusable, source-agnostic DOM renderer and interaction binder for gallery units, plus adapters that convert corpus and story records into a normalized unit shape, and a deterministic text-shaping helper that prevents raw filenames from reaching the UI.
summary_for_embedding: Pure JavaScript gallery renderer that builds phone-screen unit cards and decision slides from normalized data, with a corner-V verb wheel, deterministic voice transform, and corpus/story source adapters.
intention_for_embedding: To present heterogeneous knowledge sources through a single immersive gallery surface while keeping rendering pure and wiring interactions progressively.

symbols.does: Toggles the open/closed CSS state of the V wheel and the screen root.
symbols.description: A local helper inside DNA.bindVee that applies or removes the 'open' class on the .uv-vee element and the 'vee-open' class on the rendered screen element, used by the hub click handler and socket click handlers.

symbols.does: Closes the V wheel by delegating to setOpen(false).
symbols.description: A local helper inside DNA.bindVee that simply calls setOpen with false, used for tap-away and post-socket-fire close behavior.

symbols.does: Title-cases a string after replacing dashes and underscores with spaces.
symbols.description: A local string helper used by DNA.voiceFromDigest to turn stems like 'distill-pipeline' into 'Distill Pipeline' for derived unit titles.

symbols.does: Maps a filename to a short editorial role label.
symbols.description: A local helper used by DNA.neighboursToNodes to classify neighbour files (for example test, types, cli, entry) based on filename patterns.

symbols.does: Normalizes a neighbour score into a 0.3 to 1.0 range for visual weighting.
symbols.description: A local helper inside DNA.neighboursToNodes that spreads the min/max cosine scores across a readable size band used by the hub-network visualization.
